hero.subtitle: Upload one podcast. Get 50+ professional outputs — articles, frameworks, scripts, courses, psychological profiles, marketing funnels. Automatically. Every time.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: The internet produces infinite information.
problem.desc: But almost none of it becomes usable knowledge. Insights disappear in podcast episodes, client calls, interviews, and unstructured notes. You repeat yourself. You forget what you said. You can't find that one framework you explained brilliantly… three months ago.

solution.label: The Solution
solution.desc: AI-IDEI doesn't summarize. It structures. Every conversation becomes atomic knowledge units — neurons — connected through semantic relations into a navigable graph of your expertise. Then it generates products from that graph. Automatically.

pipeline.label: How It Works
pipeline.title: From Raw Content to Monetizable Assets
pipeline.subtitle: Five deterministic steps. No guessing. No prompt engineering. Press the button.

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.title_line2: Not Just the Content Around Them
capabilities.extraction_desc: Turns conversations into structured atomic ideas — frameworks, patterns, formulas, psychological signals. Not summaries. Structures.
capabilities.services_desc: Fixed cost. Clear deliverables. Every service has defined input, auditable execution, and predictable output. No tokens burned guessing.
capabilities.graph_desc: Neurons connect through typed relations: supports, contradicts, extends, derived_from. Your expertise becomes navigable architecture.
capabilities.economy_desc: Every operation has a visible cost in NEURONS. No subscriptions. No surprises. You see exactly what you pay — down to 0.01 USD.

use_cases.label: Who Is This For
use_cases.title: Built for People Who Create Knowledge
use_cases.subtitle: If you speak, write, teach, or consult — your expertise is leaking. We capture it.
use_cases.podcasters_desc: Turn every episode into a library of reusable frameworks, guest profiles, and content assets.
use_cases.marketers_desc: Extract decision patterns from client conversations. Generate campaigns from real buyer psychology.
use_cases.coaches_desc: Transform your methodology into structured courses, frameworks, and sellable knowledge products.
use_cases.founders_desc: Build a compounding knowledge base from market conversations, interviews, and field research.

economics.label: The Economics
economics.title: The Real Margin Comes From Reuse
economics.subtitle: A framework extracted once can be reused 10,000 times. That's not a subscription — that's a knowledge multiplication engine.

explore.label: Explore Knowledge
explore.title: Navigate the Structure of Ideas
explore.subtitle: Public knowledge infrastructure — browse insights, patterns, and frameworks extracted by the platform.

final_cta.subtitle: Create your free account. Get 500 NEURONS credits. Upload your first content and watch the magic happen — in under 2 minutes.
final_cta.footer: No credit card • No commitment • GDPR compliant

seo.title: AI-IDEI — Knowledge Extraction Operating System
seo.description: Transform expertise into digital assets. Upload content once, generate dozens of professional outputs automatically. The magic marketing button.
